snippet: Students may be permitted to stand on a school bus once all existing seating has been allocated and only when: The Department of Education must be notified by the coordinating principal where students regularly must stand in a speed zone above 80 km/h. A student is only permitted to travel between the approved bus stop nearest to their home and school. Requests to access alternative bus stops on the same route can be considered by the coordinating principal. If school bus loadings are unacceptably high, it may be necessary to reassess the availability of the bus service to those other than eligible students. The Department of Education or Department of Transport and Planning may implement temporary arrangements until all available options have been considered. Temporary arrangements may include:
